stemHtml: Which of these statements about weight or mass is correct?

options.a: The weight of a body can be determined by dividing its mass by the acceleration due to gravity.
options.b: The weight of a body can be determined by dividing the acceleration due to gravity by its mass.
options.c: The mass of a body can be determined by multiplying its weight by the acceleration due to gravity.
options.d: The mass of a body can be determined by dividing its weight by the acceleration due to gravity.
